studyName: Mitochondrial Abnormalities in Schizophrenia and Bipolar Disorder

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Psychiatric Diagnosis with respect to bipolar disorder or schizophrenia

variables.name: DLPFC_CD_percent
variables.description: DLPFC mitochondria Common Deletion (formula of DLPFC_del_copies/DLPFC_WT_copies*100)

variables.name: DLPFC_WT_ALB_ratio
variables.description: DLPFC Copy Number OF MITOCHONDRIA (ratio of DLPFC_WT_COPIES/DLPFC_ALB_copies)

variables.name: STG_CD_percent
variables.description: STG mitochondria Common Deletion (formula of STG_del_copies/STG_WT_copies*100)

variables.name: STG_WT_ALB_ratio
variables.description: STG Copy Number OF MITOCHONDRIA (ratio of STG_WT_COPIES/STG_ALB_copies)

variables.name: V1_ComplexI
variables.description: V1 Complex I Activity-HeLa cell activity standards

variables.name: V1_WT_ALB_ratio
variables.description: V1 Copy Number OF MITOCHONDRIA (ratio of V1_WT_COPIES/V1_ALB_copies)

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Psychiatric Diagnosis with respect to bipolar disorder or schizophrenia

variables.name: Aff & Psychosis Sxs
variables.description: Fulfill both psychosis and mood symptoms

variables.name: discordance
variables.description: Ancestry for discordance (Difference of mtDNA haplogroup ASSIGNED 1, and nuclear ancestry)

variables.description: Name of drug or medication, followed by concentrations
